title: Zebraman 2: Attack on Zebra City
original_title: ゼブラーマン ゼブラシティの逆襲
overview: A post-apocalyptic humankind in 2025 finds a hero in the form of Zebraman. But the Zebra Queen steals his powers, making him lose his ability to survive Zebra Time. But he wants his powers back.
